articleDir.description: The directory path where your Markdown files (.md) are stored.

imagesDir.description: The directory path where your image files are stored.

outputDir.description: The directory path where all build outputs are exported: all.json (full post data including content), category.json (category -> {image, slugs}), and tag.json (tag -> {image, slugs}).

categories.description: A whitelist of allowed categories, each with an optional image path. Unregistered categories found in markdown will be skipped. Image files themselves are not managed by this tool; only the path string is carried through to the output.

tags.description: A whitelist of allowed tags, each with an optional image path. Unregistered tags found in markdown will be skipped. Image files themselves are not managed by this tool; only the path string is carried through to the output.

name.description: The category or tag name, matched against the front matter of each post.

image.description: An optional path or URL to an image representing this category or tag (e.g. for use as a thumbnail or banner). This tool does not read, copy, or validate the image file itself.
